{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Narin
| introduced = ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn
}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Narin]] is one of the black-clad killers.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c10">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
